name: cellartracker-mcp
description: Query your CellarTracker wine cellar — inventory, drinking recommendations, purchase history, tasting notes, and wishlist.

tools.name: search-cellar
tools.description: Search your wine cellar by name, color, region, varietal, location, or vintage range.

tools.name: drinking-recommendations
tools.description: Get wine drinking recommendations sorted by urgency.

tools.name: cellar-stats
tools.description: Get cellar statistics: total bottles, value, unique wines, and optional breakdowns.

tools.name: purchase-history
tools.description: Search purchase history with spending summary.

tools.name: consumption-history
tools.description: Search your consumption history — wines you've opened and drunk.

tools.name: tasting-notes
tools.description: Search your tasting notes and reviews.

tools.name: refresh-data
tools.description: Force refresh all CellarTracker data from the server.
